name: Lo Mein with Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles according to package directions until tender but still firm; 2-3 minutes. Drain and rinse under cold running water. Drain again.
2. Toss noodles with sesame oil until well coated.
3. Combine oyster sauce, soy sauce, sugar, salt, and pepper in a small bowl.
4. Heat vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over high heat. Add ginger and garlic and stir-fry for 10 seconds.
5. Add shrimp; stir-fry until pink, about 1 minute.
6. Add sherry and chives; stir-fry until chives begin to wilt, about 15 seconds.
7. Add half of the bean sprouts; stir-fry for 15 seconds.
8. Add remaining bean sprouts, stirring for 15 seconds more.
9. Add oyster sauce mixture and noodles. Cook and stir until heated through, about 2 minutes.
10. Serve and enjoy.
